title: [TASK] Define foundational architecture for CV Creation Tool

conversation_log.summary: Task approved as a foundational architectural task. Correctly scoped — architecture.md is empty and must be populated before feature implementation. All proposed tech stack decisions are consistent with Epic #2. Constraints noted: i18n library TBD, contracts owned by packages/contracts/, migration naming must be timestamp-prefixed, all 4 ADR entries required in tech-decisions.md.

Task definition is architecturally sound and already partially executed. architecture.md is fully populated. tech-decisions.md has 4 of 7 required ADRs (Turborepo, scoped naming, TypeScript strict, folder structure). Three ADRs still needed: oRPC as RPC framework, PostgreSQL as database, TanStack Router + Query as frontend data layer. These must be added before the task can be marked complete.
